gearBands.title: Finish your current job and story gear foundation
gearBands.where: Your current expansion's main city, job quests, and unlocked tomestone vendor
gearBands.get: A complete level-appropriate set, starting with weapon and the lowest item-level slots
gearBands.why: Replacing the weakest slots first gives the fastest average item-level gain. Exact vendor names change by patch, so confirm them in the current patch notes or update feed.

gearBands.title: Fill weak slots with current capped and uncapped currency gear
gearBands.where: The current endgame hub's tomestone exchange and normal-raid exchange NPCs
gearBands.get: Weapon/chest/legs first when affordable, then replace whichever slot has the largest item-level gap
gearBands.why: Large-stat pieces and your weakest slots usually make the climb clearer and faster.

gearBands.title: Move into current raid, upgrade-material, and high-end crafted options
gearBands.where: Current normal/alliance raids, capped tomestone vendor, crafted-gear market, and upgrade NPC
gearBands.get: A weekly upgrade plan that respects currency and loot lockouts
gearBands.why: At the top end, weekly limits matter more than raw farming. Pick upgrades that avoid replacing the same slot twice.
